title: Spec Script
content:
Spec Script

Original Script
A host of artists/athletes are drafted and sent on a one way trip to a colony on a recently discovered inhabitable planet. Their only mission is to exist and further human culture. Once a week a person will be castrated until the end of the series where the couple must pro create. PSA: these artists have not been screened, have not been tested, or vetted beyond their art. 6 males and 6 females have been chosen from a pool of a million for a one way ticket to where every detail of their life will be broadcasted to the folks back home. Each month a male and female will be castrated. The last two who survive will procreate. Every year (season) a new band will be sent along.

Length?
Tone?

At the beginning, the group is sequestered in one section of the colony, and every week a new section of the colony opens up presenting new challenges, amenities, and information regarding everyone’s history.

Truman Show, LOST, faux reality tv with interview portions



Instead of doing a sort of procedural science fiction, I want to skip to the part where no science or math is really involved in the series. Just character. The people are safe on this colony.
